notes: Reference adapter shipped with @finsys/adapter-toolkit. Pairs with the sibling fake-telco-api container; configure FAKE_TELCO_API_URL + FAKE_TELCO_API_KEY in the host environment. requiredIdentityFields is empty because this adapter only needs the core ApplicantIdentity trio (ihsId, ic, fullName) — declaring core fields here is a schema error since they may legitimately be absent for non-MY scope; the adapter's fetch() does its own defensive check and throws AdapterError('payload_invalid') if ic/fullName are empty. SYS-3033: the four *Tier fields are coarse-bucket enum-kind parallels of this adapter's own continuous/discrete signals (payment ratio, tenure months, suspensions+late-days, handset flags) -- deliberately declared with numeric-string labels ("1"-"4", "N"/"Y") to exercise the string-coercion seam a code review caught breaking scoring when a numeric-looking label got silently coerced to a number downstream.
